'''Mining Station Alpha''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Space station/Legends|station]] that was located in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] above the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. It was here where the monster [[Spore]] was contained. The station was later destroyed by [[Fandomar Nadon]] in an attempt to defeat Spore.

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: Spore]]''
